nodes.name: get_latest_versions.sql
nodes.summary: Parameterised SQL query that returns the latest published environment feature version per feature/environment as of a given time, filtered by environment id or API key.
nodes.languageNotes: Self-joins the environmentfeatureversion table against a MAX(live_from) subquery to select the most recent published version per (feature, environment) pair, with named bind parameters.
